characters.name: Conrad Sinclair
characters.description: Conrad SinclairFull NameConrad SinclairCharacter InformationOccupationBusinessmanDate of Birth1950FatherMr. SinclairMotherMrs. SinclairRelationship StatusDivorcedPartnerMrs. Sinclair [Divorced]Series InformationStatusDeceased Conrad Sinclair was a wealthy American businessman. He was the father ofReece Sinclair,Krista Sinclairand an unknown amount of others. Conrad was born in New Hampshire to semi-wealthy parents. Over the years, Conrad’s fortune grew greatly. He married a woman called Jane in 1980. Sometime in the 80s, Jane gave birth toReece Sinclair.

characters.name: Hope Sinclair
characters.description: Hope SinclairCharacter InformationFatherEden ShawMotherKrista SinclairSeries InformationStatusDeceasedDuration2024 Hope Sinclairis the deceased daughter ofKrista SinclairandEden Shaw, the niece toReece Sinclair, and granddaughter to Conrad Sinclair and Krista’s mother. Krista Sinclairfinds out she’s pregnant with her criminal boyfriend,Eden Shaw’sbaby, but wants to keep the baby. Krista later datesLeo Tanakaand Leo wants to raise the babg as his own, andKristais happy because of this. Later on, Krista would find out byDr. Remi Varga-Murphythat her baby’s gender was a girl. The pregnancy journey would be going well forKristaand the baby girl until Krista was needed byChelsea Murphyto check out a problem in the Lassiters Sauna, as Chelsea wanted to do a presentation that was meant to be hosted by Krista. Once she got there,Kristawas trapped inside because her key card wouldn’t work. She began to overheat in the hot sauna temperatures and blacked out right in front of the door.
